text:
There was a boy named Oliver. He loved green. His favorite things were old books filled with green creatures. He would spend hours studying their colors. That was how he learned to identify all the different trees.

Oliver wanted a pet. He thought maybe an owl would love to hunt owl pellets. So he got one. It was quiet. There was just something serene in the owl's silent wisdom.

One night, Oliver wanted to write something. Only he'd forgotten all his thoughts. Perhaps an owl would know something.

He wrote down everything the owl said.

They went walking.

The owl noticed old leaves.

That night?

They talked night talk for hours. Oliver learned everything there was to know about owl life.

So that's what Oliver did. He wrote everything.

They lived happily ever after.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
